case_title: KELLY PALMER VS. R PATRICK MALKASSIAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PALMER, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MALKASSIAN, R PATRICK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-15-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALMER, KELLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALKASSIAN, R PATRICK $3,550.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,640.00, BALANCE OF SECURITY DEPOSIT WITHHELD FROM PLAINTIFF. LABOR WAS CHARGED TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED FEB-11-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MALKASSIAN, R PATRICK
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALMER, KELLY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF KELLY PALMER IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT R. PATRICK MALKASSIAN PRESENT WITH WITNESS BHARAT SAHGAL, PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALMER, KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT MALKASSIAN, R PATRICK
